heading: Authorizations for appropriations
label: 2809 Authorizations for appropriations
notes: Codificationand made identical amendments to this section. The amendments by were repealed by .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246

Amendments2018— substituted “2023” for “2018” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 115–3342014— substituted “2018” for “2012” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 113–792008—Pars. (1) to (3). , substituted “2012” for “2007”.Pub. L. 110–246, § 74142002—Pars. (1) to (3). substituted “2007” for “2002”.Pub. L. 107–1711998—Pars. (1) to (3). substituted “fiscal years 1991 through 2002” for “the fiscal years 1991, 1992, and 1993”.Pub. L. 105–1851990—Pars. (1) to (3). amended pars. (1) to (3) generally. Prior to amendment, pars. (1) to (3) read as follows:Pub. L. 101–624“(1) to the Department of Agriculture, $2,000,000 for each of fiscal years 1984 and 1985, and $1,000,000 for each of fiscal years 1986, 1987, and 1988;“(2) to the Department of Commerce, $2,000,000 for each of fiscal years 1984 and 1985, and $1,000,000 for each of fiscal years 1986, 1987, and 1988; and“(3) to the Department of the Interior, $1,000,000 for each of fiscal years 1984 and 1985, and $1,000,000 for each of fiscal years 1986, 1987, and 1988.”1985—Pars. (1) to (3). inserted provisions authorizing appropriations of $1,000,000 for each of fiscal years 1986, 1987, and 1988.Pub. L. 99–1981984—Pars. (1), (2). substituted provisions authorizing appropriations of $2,000,000 for each of fiscal years 1984 and 1985 for provisions which had authorized appropriations of $7,000,000 for fiscal year 1981, $10,000,000 for fiscal year 1982, and $12,000,000 for fiscal year 1983.Pub. L. 98–623Par. (3). substituted provisions authorizing appropriations of $1,000,000 for each of fiscal years 1984 and 1985 for provisions which had authorized appropriations of $3,000,000 for fiscal year 1981, $4,000,000 for fiscal year 1982, and $5,000,000 for fiscal year 1983.Pub. L. 98–623

children.text: to the Department of Agriculture, $1,000,000 for each of fiscal years 1991 through 2023;
to the Department of Commerce, $1,000,000 for each of fiscal years 1991 through 2023; and
to the Department of Interior, $1,000,000 for each of fiscal years 1991 through 2023.1So in original. Probably should be “of the”.1
